name: Rice with Poblanos
recipeIngredient: 1/2 kg Oaxaca cheese (or any substitute that can be melted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein 8 Poblanos, reserving the seeds. Fill with cheese and keep.
2. In a blender, combine diced tomatoes, one garlic clove, half onion, serranos, one Poblano, and cilantro. Blend until smooth.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a large saucepan. Fry rice, adding the remaining 1/2 onion and one garlic clove.
4. Warm the chicken broth on the stove (heat can be adjusted). When hot, add it to the pan with the rice mixture.
5. Stir in the green peas. Cook for a few more minutes.
6. Add the blended tomato mixture and green salsa.
7. Return the reserved Poblano seeds with cheese to the pot. Add additional cilantro if desired.
8. Simmer over medium heat, uncovered, for about 20 minutes.
